message:
🐛 Fix font size controls not working in tile mode (#156)

The useEffect for globalFontSize had 'if (tileMode) return;' which
skipped all font updates when tiles were active. The counter updated
but terminals kept their old font size.

Fix: apply tile-derived font (globalFontSize - 3 for 2+ tiles) in
the same effect. Verified via CDP that actual rendered font changes
live from 11px to 17px when counter goes 14→20.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
